'''Kessel: Hell in Space''' was a series of ''[[Planet Hoppers]]'' articles published by [[Wizards of the Coast]] that detailed the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]]. It was written by [[Cory J. Herndon]] and published on [[Wizards.com]] in [[May]] [[2003]], as a supplement to the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]''.

==Contents==
===Part 1: Rotten to the Core===
''…a young [[Gyylghrard|Wookiee]] accepts [[Slavery/Legends|enslavement]] on [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]] to save his family's lives.''<ref name="Kessel" />

===Part 2: In the Land of the Blind===
''…young Wookiee slave Gyylghrard gets a dressing-down from [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoner]]-official [[Moruth Doole]].''<ref name="Kessel" />

===Part 3: Hope in Darkness===
''…a few bold Wookiees and a group of slave children honor tradition even in the [[Spice mines of Kessel/Legends|Mines of Kessel]].''<ref name="Kessel" />

===Part 4: On the Moon===
''…Gyylghrard pulls janitorial duty in the administrative wings of the [[Prison/Legends|prison]].''<ref name="Kessel" />

===Part 5: The Warden===
''…a young Wookiee slave meets his oppressor and makes a fateful choice.''<ref name="Kessel" />
